trigger.from_prompt: Build me a plugin for MiraboxSpace StreamDock VSD N4 Pro that Utilizes the Touchbar Mode to display the currently playing song and artist from Apple Music Desktop Application. The plugin should take up the entire length of the VSD N4 Pro touch bar for display.

trigger.discovery_amendment_rationale: No Discovery assumption is invalidated by the escalations; all uncovered Discovery-side fields are entailed by existing TD-side assertions that simply need their `covers` arrays widened. Orchestrator inlined the Discovery amendment step as a no-op and routed Researcher findings directly to TD impact-analysis.

trigger.symptom: Bundle did not appear in VSD Craft side panel after install on Windows host.
trigger.failure_classification: environmental-evidence blindness at IP-resolution time; Discovery default accepted by TD without quick-reasoning-rubric exercise; no 'should we ask?' gate on high-importance IPs.
proposed_v1_9_amendments: Discovery charter — environmental-evidence inspection step before locking any IP
TD charter — discovery_default_accepted is NOT a rubric bypass; rubric runs on every IP resolution
Importance-as-load-bearing — high-importance IPs require explicit rubric pass and Researcher dispatch by default
PNV scope expansion — new sibling assertion prompt_environment_assertion exercises installability in actual user environment
Reaudit reverse-pattern — user-side-failure.json triggers Re-Verification under current architecture asking 'what gate should have caught this?'
trigger.second_consecutive_run_pattern: This is the second consecutive run where the architecture's gates passed but the user's actual environment was the unmodeled variable. First was the latex-CDN run that v1.5 was created to close (verification fidelity). This one is decision-making fidelity. Same root-cause class, one level up the stack — the gap Principle E is designed to close.

evidence_signals: vsd_craft_install_attempt (C:\Program Files (x86)\VSD Craft\plugins side panel empty)
user_explicit_resolution_choice (Windows-only rebuild — drop macOS branch entirely)

meta_check_summary.verdict: goal-affecting (2 yes among b and d). Route to TD impact analysis.

trigger.user_surfacing_state: pre-committed (user explicitly chose Windows-only rebuild before this dispatch was opened)
oos_items_added: Cross-platform single-bundle (one .sdPlugin that runs on both macOS and Windows)
trigger.principle_e_grounding_note: This amendment ratifies the host-OS decision against the strongest available evidence (user's actual environment + explicit user choice), per the proposed Principle E (Decision Grounding) in root-cause-analysis.md.

trigger.topic: Windows now-playing data-acquisition mechanism (replacement for AppleScript path dropped by ledger-diff-v2)
options: opt-A inline PowerShell + WinRT SMTC via child_process.execFile
opt-B long-running PowerShell helper subscribing to SMTC events
opt-C bundled precompiled nowplaying.exe (Rust windows-rs or self-contained .NET)
trigger.rationale_summary: Smallest possible blast radius: only S5's music_source.js changes; S2/S3/S4/S6 byte-identical. C-S4-S5 contract surface preserved verbatim (mechanism-agnostic by design). Zero install footprint (PowerShell 5.1 + WinRT ship in every Windows 10/11). Zero new dependencies. ~400 ms PS cold start well below 2000 ms poll cadence. opt-B deferred to future enhancement (A6 amendment). opt-C/D add bundle weight, build-toolchain, or AV-surface risk.

trigger.topic: How VSD Craft on Windows runs a .js plugin entry (wrapper vs direct, bundled Node vs system Node vs vendored binary)
options: A declare Nodejs.Version in manifest; point CodePathWin directly at plugin/main.js (host runs it with bundled Node)
C bundle a portable node.exe inside the plugin + .cmd wrapper
trigger.rationale_summary: MiraboxSpace/StreamDock-Plugin-SDK mirrors Elgato Stream Deck manifest schema. When manifest declares Nodejs.Version, host runs CodePathWin as a Node script using its bundled runtime. No wrappers, no bundled binary, no system-Node requirement, no new files. Honors S2/S3/S4/S6 preservation list. Manifest-only change.

section_changes_summary.S1: manifest OS array mac->windows; +Nodejs:{Version:'20'}; +CodePathWin:'plugin/main.js'; drop CodePathMac; remove plugin/run.sh; Description updated; AA.S1.5 flipped; new AA.S1.6 + MCA.TDIPA.4 added
section_changes_summary.S5: renamed music-source-applescript -> music-source-smtc (id 'S5' preserved); module body and AA.S5.1-4 + MCA.TDIPD.1/2 literals rewritten from AppleScript+osascript to PowerShell+WinRT SMTC; C-S4-S5 surface + dev-002 MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE shim preserved verbatim
section_changes_summary.S6: fixture key rename osascript->powershell.exe; AA.S6.3 prose updated

v3_cycle_artifacts.pnv_v3_verdict: pass (production-fidelity ceiling with Linux-sandbox / no-powershell.exe caveat documented explicitly)

inline_deviations_v3.summary: Manifest Nodejs object includes only Version; GenerateProfilerData omitted (matches MCA.TDIPA.4 expected_value).
PowerShell script embedded in music_source.js as array of single-quoted JS strings joined with '\n' to avoid template-literal interpretation of PS backtick/$ sigils.
plugin/run.sh could not be physically deleted in cowork sandbox; reduced to inert comment-only content; not referenced by manifest; flagged for physical removal at final-delivery.

v3_cycle_artifacts.critic_v3_finding_pattern: Same low-severity inline-deviation flag pattern as v1 Critic-v2 (deviations missing changes_artifact/changes_contract/changes_assumption boolean fields, documentation-completeness only). Not a blocker.
v3_cycle_artifacts.delivery_caveat: Sandbox disallowed `rm -rf output/final/...`; Write tool overwrite + bash cp used to replace v1 files in place. Bit-equivalent to output/integration/ modulo run.sh comment-only content. Documented in output/final/divergence-from-integration.json filesystem_caveat.
